title: Opened nested left-filter category prunes empty leaves
summary: Builds direct opened nested filter data, a card tagged only for the kept leaf, and proves the matching leaf remains while the empty leaf is absent.
useWhen: The changed code removes empty nested filter items from an initially open left filter.
The behavior is driven by direct filter data rather than a click or expand interaction.

keptId.description: Leaf that has a matching card tag.

removedId.description: Leaf that has no matching card tag.
